prose: Fukui reactivity indices for benzaldehyde computed using DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard), in the gas phase, charge 0, singlet with N±1 doublet states. The dual descriptor (f⁺ − f⁻) shows clear regioselectivity, with positive values on aromatic carbons (electrophilic character, especially ortho/para to the aldehyde) and negative on hydrogens and the aldehyde carbon itself (nucleophilic character). All convergence checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0000, sum f⁻ = 1.0000). Calculation status: ok, trustworthy=true. No warnings.
